mapper.sql: from content c left join topic cat on c.topic_id = cat.id left join user u on c.anonymous_id = u.anonymous_id
mapper.insert: insert into content (content_text, image_urls, anonymous_id, topic_id, like_count, comment_count, hug_count, content_status, risk_level, risk_score, detected_keywords, warning_status, emotion_type, emotion_score, create_time, update_time) values (#{contentText}, #{imageUrls}, #{anonymousId}, #{topicId}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{hugCount}, #{contentStatus}, #{safety.riskLevel}, #{safety.riskScore}, #{safety.detectedKeywords}, #{safety.warningStatus}, #{safety.emotionType}, #{safety.emotionScore}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: where c.content_status = 1 order by c.create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
where c.id = #{id}
where c.anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} order by c.create_time desc
where c.anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} order by c.create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: update content set content_status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update content set like_count = like_count + #{delta} where id = #{id} and like_count + #{delta} >= 0
update content set comment_count = comment_count + #{delta} where id = #{id} and comment_count + #{delta} >= 0
update content set hug_count = hug_count + #{delta} where id = #{id} and hug_count + #{delta} >= 0
mapper.select: where content_status = 1 and content_text like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content WHERE content_status = 1
mapper.update: update content set risk_level = #{riskLevel}, risk_score = #{riskScore}, detected_keywords = #{detectedKeywords}, warning_status = #{warningStatus}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select risk_level, warning_status, count(*) as count from content where risk_level > 0 group by risk_level, warning_status
select count(*) from content where risk_level = 3 and warning_status = 0
select count(*) from content
select date(create_time) as date, count(*) as count from content where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 7 day) group by date(create_time) order by date(create_time) desc

select t.topic_name as tag, count(c.id) as count from content c inner join topic t on c.topic_id = t.id where c.content_status = 1 and t.topic_name is not null and t.topic_name != '' group by t.topic_name having count(c.id) > 0 order by count desc limit 10

select sum(case when emotion_type = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(*) as positive, sum(case when emotion_type = 2 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(*) as neutral, sum(case when emotion_type = 3 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(*) as negative from content where content_status = 1
